description.value: A stroke of lightning forming a line 60 feet long and 5 feet wide blasts out from you. All creatures in the line take [[/damage 28 type=lightning]] damage. Each target takes the full listed damage and makes their own save.

system.effect: A stroke of lightning forming a line 60 feet long and 5 feet wide blasts out from you. All creatures in the line take 28 lightning damage. Each target takes the full listed damage and makes their own save.
system.targetingSuccessScaling: 0 = fails, 1 = half damage (14), 2 = full damage (28), 3 = enhanced damage (36) + applies effects
system.weavingRoll: Air Potential + Air Mastery / Space Potential + Space Mastery
